intro.h3: Are you looking for an innovative solution?
intro.text: With our research-centric approach, we look forward to delivering a  final product that achieves a goal effectively, and is -of course- fun  to play!

step1.heading: Define
step1.text: Identify what is the problem, or case, and break it down into small, manageable pieces.

step2.heading: Research
step2.text: Look for more information about the problem and try to understand it, so that we can know more about it.

step3.heading: Concept
step3.text: Design ideas and potential solutions to the problem, focusing on variety and creativity.

step4.heading: Develop
step4.text: Select a promising idea and develop it. Create a prototype that showcases the core ideas.

step5.heading: Test
step5.text: Using the prototypes, test the game with players and see if it achieves the intended purpose, as well as identifying problems with it.
